capacitivesensor_create.message0: Create capacitive sensor %1 transmit pin %2 receive pin %3
capacitivesensor_create.tooltip: Create a capacitive touch sensor object, specifying the send and receive pins

capacitivesensor_read.message0: Capacitive sensor %1 Read filtered value Number of samples %2
capacitivesensor_read.tooltip: Read the touch value after removing the baseline. The larger the number of samples, the more stable it will be.

capacitivesensor_read_raw.message0: Capacitive sensor %1 Read raw value Number of samples %2
capacitivesensor_read_raw.tooltip: Read the raw capacitance value without baseline correction

capacitivesensor_set_timeout.tooltip: Configure the timeout time of the charge and discharge cycle to prevent infinite waiting under strong interference

capacitivesensor_set_autocal.message0: Capacitive sensor %1 Set auto-calibration interval %2 milliseconds
capacitivesensor_set_autocal.tooltip: Set the automatic baseline calibration interval, 0 means turn off automatic calibration

capacitivesensor_reset_autocal.tooltip: Reset the baseline immediately, often used at startup or after a sensor status change

capacitivesensor_wiring_hint.tooltip: Refer to the connection method of the transmit/receive pin and resistor of the capacitive touch sensor, no code is generated
